metadata.resolution: stages.ts:91 introduces editingSessionState aggregate; initialize-capture.ts:71 emits CaptureSessionStarted with editingSessionState. Confirmed by sprint-2 adversary review.
initialize-capture.ts:32 declares noteCreate port; line 59 invokes Note.create with empty Body. Confirmed by sprint-2 adversary review.
Option A: REQ-015 amended (Clock.now budget = 2 per run, Step 3 receives ts as arg). PROP-023 added.
scan-vault.ts:101-111 enforces NoteId regex via VO smart constructor. Confirmed by sprint-2 adversary review.
Tags narrowed to readonly Tag[]; body remains string contradicting verification-architecture.md:76-78. See FIND-013 / BEAD-069 for the residual defect.
scan-vault.ts:113-123 enforces Tag VO admissibility; new fail-grade tests for empty/whitespace tags added. Confirmed by sprint-2 adversary review.
pipeline.test.ts:55-56 introduces TS positive-membership type assertion for VaultScanned. Negative direction handled separately as FIND-012 (BEAD-068).
load-vault-config.ts:34 declares clockNow port; line 65 uses it. Confirmed by sprint-2 adversary review.
REQ-004 amended: Err(disk-full|lock|unknown) collapse to path-not-found; F-005 expanded with explicit mapping. PROP-024 added.

metadata.statement: Clock.now is called at most twice per pipeline run; hydrateFeed contains no Clock.now call and accepts no timestamp argument.
For each statDir result kind (Ok(true), Ok(false), Err(not-found), Err(permission), Err(disk-full|lock|unknown)), loadVaultConfig maps to the spec-defined reason.

metadata.title: PROP-023 type-level assertion is tautological — `undefined as never` does not enforce hydrateFeed signature
PROP-021 negative-membership Tier-0 assertions tautological for FeedRestored / TagInventoryBuilt
ParsedNote.body retained as string — port contract requires Body VO (FIND-005 partial regression)
REQ-010: Step 4 calls noteCreate but discards the constructed Note — disposition unclear
metadata.resolution: Option A: REQ-010 NOTE clarifies Note aggregate is constructed for invariant + event-emission semantics, not retention. PROP-013 description tightened to encode non-retention as a TypeScript shape constraint (REQ-010 added to PROP-013 Covers REQ).

metadata.note: PROP-023b strengthened — fails compile if hydrateFeed gains a Timestamp parameter or arity grows.
PROP-021 negative-membership strengthened — fails compile if feed-restored or tag-inventory-built is added to PublicDomainEvent.

metadata.remediationTarget: promptnotes/src/lib/domain/app-startup/stages.ts:32 (ParsedNote.body: string → Body) + scan-vault.ts:127 (drop `as unknown as Body` cast)
metadata.note: Tightens PROP-001 port contract: ParsedNote.body must be Body VO end-to-end. Genuine Red — fails compile until 2b updates stages.ts.
Load-bearing PROP-013 guard under structural typing; the TypeScript shape constraint cannot prove non-retention by itself.

metadata.assertion: noteCreate spy returns a sentinel-marked Note; no top-level InitialUIState value === sentinel and no value carries __noteCreateSentinel__ marker
metadata.note: Negative test — proves Note aggregate constructed by Step 4 is discarded, not retained on InitialUIState.

beads.summary: stages.ts: ParsedNote.body tightened to Body VO (FIND-013 resolution Tier-0 contract)
scan-vault.ts: removed parsed.body cast at snapshot construction (FIND-013 residual)
step2-scan-vault.test.ts: makeBody helper + 5 parser-stub raw-string → makeBody updates
pipeline.test.ts: Body import + makeBody helper + 1 parser-stub update

details.watchpointForSprint3: PROP-013 must be implemented as a runtime Object.keys assertion on InitialUIState (not a TypeScript type assertion which would be tautological under structural typing). The new test should assert Object.keys(initialUIState).sort() === ['corruptedFiles', 'editingSessionState', 'feed', 'tagInventory'].

sprint-1.reason: earliest-affected-phase: spec ambiguity raised by FIND-003 (REQ-015 vs REQ-013a/b clock confinement) and FIND-010 (REQ-004 statDir error variants).

sprint-2.reason: earliest-affected-phase: spec ambiguity in REQ-010 raised by FIND-014 (Note aggregate disposition unclear). Other findings will be addressed in 2a (FIND-011, FIND-012 — type-level assertion strengthening) and 2b (FIND-013 — ParsedNote.body Body VO) once the spec is refined.

sprint-3.reason: earliest-affected-phase: FIND-015 (PROP-003 衝突回避テストの tautological 化, route 2a) は FIND-016 (Frontmatter port 契約違反, route 2b) より早いフェーズ。2a への直接ルーティングで両方を sprint-4 サイクル内で解消する。

iterationLimit.warning: phase-3 cap reached. /vcsdd-escalate is required before next /vcsdd-adversary invocation.

findings.title: PROP-003 衝突回避テストはタイムスタンプ生成基準値の不一致により衝突パスを実行していない
ParsedNote.fm が verification-architecture のポート契約 (Frontmatter VO) と一致せず scan-vault.ts:131 で as unknown as Frontmatter キャストが残存

redPhase.mixedMode: 1 routed finding (FIND-013) is genuine Red via compile-time guard; FIND-011/012/014 are coverage-retrofit because the impl already satisfies them

FIND-013.remediationTarget: promptnotes/src/lib/domain/app-startup/stages.ts:32 (ParsedNote.body: string → Body) + scan-vault.ts:127 (drop `as unknown as Body` cast)

FIND-011.note: Replaced tautological `_noTimestamp = undefined as never` with arity (`length = 1`), exact-tuple-shape (`extends [ScannedVault]`), and no-Timestamp-anywhere (`_IsNever<Extract<...,{epochMillis:number}>>`) guards.

FIND-012.note: Replaced tautological `_f / _t = undefined as never` with `_IsNever<T>` predicate; positive direction (vault-scanned IS in PublicDomainEvent) preserved unchanged.

FIND-014.note: Phase 1c iteration-4 watchpoint — Object.keys(state).sort() === ['corruptedFiles','editingSessionState','feed','kind','tagInventory'] runtime assertion + Note non-retention sentinel test. Structural typing cannot prove non-retention; runtime is load-bearing.

promptnotes/src/lib/domain/app-startup/scan-vault.ts: removed `parsed.body as unknown as Body` cast at snapshot construction; removed unused Body import

step3-hydrate-feed.test.ts and step4-initialize-capture.test.ts: no changes needed (already use makeBody / Body cast)

refactorPhase.rationale: Phase 2b changes are already minimal and clean. The makeBody helper duplication across 3 test files matches the established pattern (each test file has its own makeVaultPath/makeTimestamp/makeNoteId per existing convention); extracting to shared module would add a new file rather than reduce code. stages.ts docstring already updated as part of the type tightening. scan-vault.ts is shorter (cast + import removed). No code smell to address.
